label: NastyNeve v1 — textbook bus comp
_doc: Neve-flavored bus compressor recipe. v1 = bare-bones textbook structure;
v2 will add the diodeBridgeGR character stage as a post-VCA harmonic shaper.
DESIGN HISTORY: this recipe was rebuilt 2026-04-27 after the 2-op
failed audible compression tests. Audit of airwindows/Pressure5 + BussColors4
and re-read of TOY_COMP confirmed the textbook 5-op chain is the correct
optoCell) are now understood as character primitives, not complete compressors.
detector.mode  = peak       (Neve 33609 is peak-sensing, not RMS)
gainComputer.thresholdDb = -18  (typical bus-comp position; expects hot input)
gainComputer.kneeDb      = 6    (soft knee — Neve character is gentle)
makeup.gainDb            = +6   (compensates for ~6 dB GR at default settings)

ui._doc_lockedParams: Internal sidechain wiring + the n_vca base-gain stage are recipe-author-vetted and not user-touchable. Locking them here drops them from APVTS so the editor only renders 6 knobs (Attack / Release / Threshold / Ratio / Knee / Makeup) instead of 10. The locked params still get their JSON defaults baked into MasterGraph::prepare().
